critical: 🔴 DEEPLY UNPROFITABLE: Ad cost per unit sold is $38.57 vs target $12.50 — spending 3× the target on ads per sale.
🔴 NEGATIVE CONTRIBUTION MARGIN: -$115.31 over 31 days. Business is burning cash at ~$3.72/day net.
🔴 AMAZON CHARGE DUE 4/11: -$119.29 scheduled charge — cash flow impact this week.
🔴 SALES RANK DECLINING: 144,487 → 158,384 (worsened 13,897 positions in 1 day). Organic visibility shrinking.
warning: 🟡 MASSIVELY OVERSTOCKED: Fountain 1,635 days cover (376 units), Filters 1,100 days cover (142 units). Long-term storage fees accumulating.
🟡 RAZOR-BLADE RATIO 0.57: Below 1.0 target — filter repeat purchase engine underperforming.
🟡 DAILY VELOCITY 0.23/day: Need ~1.0 units/day minimum to justify current ad spend levels.
🟡 AD SPEND NOT CUT: Budget reduction recommended 4/4 appears unactioned. $45/day continues to burn.
🟡 PROMO REBATES -$99.98: Large promo spend in current settlement period — ensure promotions are strategic.
positive: 🟢 INVENTORY SECURE: No stockout risk for 3+ years at current velocity.
🟢 BUY BOX 100%: Full ownership, no competitive pressure on buy box.
🟢 FILTER CVR 23.53%: Repeat purchase conversion is strong — customers who find the listing buy.
🟢 GROSS MARGIN HEALTHY: 33.8% fountain, 45.4% filters — unit economics work if ad spend comes down.
